potential_missing.source_sentence: solve this, the system manages the lifecycle of a rate based on time.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When a new rate is created, it is not immediately applied. Instead, it remains in a waiting phase until its start date is reached.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall keep the rate in a waiting state until the start date arrives.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall remove or archive the rate after one year from its expiration date.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states that rates are removed or archived 'after a certain period of time, such as one year from its expiration', but it does not specify exactly one year.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall maintain the rate's active state until the end of its validity period.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is implied in the source text but not explicitly stated as a separate requirement.
